description_long: This is a full-size, rectangular computer keyboard with a matte black finish and a standard key layout, including a numeric keypad on the right. The surface is populated with evenly spaced, slightly raised keys, each labeled with white characters for easy visibility. The keyboard's body appears to be made of molded plastic, with a low-profile design and a flat base for stable placement on desks or tables. The keys are of uniform height and shape, with a slight concavity for ergonomic finger placement. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, and no brand logo is present on the surface. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A matte black, full-size computer keyboard with a standard key layout and numeric keypad, featuring white-labeled keys and a clean, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the main typing area and numeric keypad.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the low-profile design and the uniform height of the keys.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the keyboard's length and the arrangement of the keys from the back.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the key layout and the flat, stable base.
